title: dais cotinifolia var. laurifolia
intro: Dais cotinifolia var. laurifolia, also known as the 'Laurifolia', is a variety of the Dais cotinifolia plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly referred to as the 'Lemon Bush' due to its citrus-like fragrance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dais cotinifolia var. laurifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections, among others. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
